settings.api_key_help: Your API token that you can get from proxytracer.com.
settings.fail_open_help: If enabled, users are allowed through if the ProxyTracer API times out or goes down.
settings.trust_cloudflare_help: Required if your site is behind Cloudflare to accurately read user IPs. Do not enable this in other scenarios.
settings.ip_whitelist_help: Enter IPs or CIDR ranges to bypass the proxy check, separated by newlines.
